name: Weather Tool
description: Weather-only utility for forecast lookup, rain probability, temperature, and umbrella advice.

name: Travel Tool
description: Travel-only utility for flights, trains, hotels, and ticket booking. Not for generic planning or unrelated future requests.

name: Calculation Tool
description: Numeric-only utility for arithmetic, percentages, and unit conversion. Not for scheduling, broad advice, or general planning.

name: Document Tool
description: Text-only utility for summarizing, rewriting, and extracting information from documents or notes.

name: Finance Tool
description: Finance-only utility for stock prices, crypto prices, and market performance.

name: Calendar Tool
description: Calendar-only utility for alarms, meetings, appointment changes, and event scheduling.
